channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Over 200 Tesla Cybercabs Spotted at Giga Texas
item.description: Over 200 Tesla Cybercabs Spotted at Giga Texas

item.title: Tesla Is Actually Doing Pretty Well In California Again
item.description: After a rough 2025, Tesla sales are rebounding in America's biggest market for EVs.

item.title: Tesla Is $370: Should You Buy?
item.description: Tesla's latest earnings beat sent bulls scrambling to defend a valuation that prices in three businesses that do not yet exist, while the one that does keeps losing ground. Before Q2 results land on July 22, the gap between story and spreadsheet deserves a hard look.

item.title: Tesla’s Q2 preview: the numbers will beat, but will the narrative?
item.description: Investing.com -- Tesla heads into its Q2 2026 earnings report trading at 177 times forward earnings, the highest multiple among the Magnificent 7, leaving almost no room for disappointment when results drop after the close on Wednesday, July 22.

item.title: SpaceX, Micron, Western Digital, Sandisk, Danaher, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: The AI trade is back as investors shrug off fears about a slew of cheap Chinese large-language models.

item.title: Tesla spins up robotaxi pilots in Orlando and Tampa ahead of Q2 earnings
item.description: The company didn't say how many are in each city, and has taken a far more cautious approach to scaling the network than CEO Elon Musk had promised.

item.title: Chevy and Cadillac essentially have no new EVs planned as GM shifts back to gas
item.description: Chevrolet is the second most popular EV brand in the US behind Tesla, while Cadillac carved out a market in the luxury space. With essentially zero new or updated EVs now planned over the next few years, GM is leaving the door wide open for rivals to take the lead.

item.title: Tesla Rallies Ahead of Earnings as Options Signal 6% Stock Swing
item.description: Tesla Rises Before Earnings; Options Traders Expect Major Breakout

item.title: Elon Musk Says He’s Got No Problem Being Hated — ‘I’ll Say What I Want to Say and if the Consequence Is Losing Money, So Be It’
item.description: Most executives spend years trying not to offend customers, advertisers or investors. Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk has taken the opposite approach, arguing that worrying about being liked is a weakness—and one he’s never wanted to have. "I’ll say...

item.title: Tesla Announces Summer Update: Grok Vehicle Commands, Preferred Routes, Add Vehicle Wraps in App and More
item.description: Tesla Announces Summer Update: Grok Vehicle Commands, Preferred Routes, Add Vehicle Wraps in App and More

item.title: TSLA Stock Gains For First Time In Five Sessions – Tesla Expands Robotaxi Service In Florida Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
item.description: Tesla launched its Robotaxi service in Orlando and Tampa, its third launch in Florida after debuting the autonomous service in Miami earlier this month.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Launches Unsupervised Rides in Orlando, Tampa
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi Launches Unsupervised Rides in Orlando, Tampa

item.title: Tesla Widens Robotaxi Rollout Ahead of Q2 Results
item.description: The service now runs in Austin, Dallas, Houston, Miami and both new Florida markets

item.title: Tesla’s 2026 Summer Update: auto navigation, Grok phone calls, Caraoke scoring, and more
item.description: Tesla started rolling out its 2026 Summer Update, and the automaker published the full release notes on X. The headline additions: Grok can finally control more of the car, Caraoke now keeps score, navigation learns your routine, and several features move to the mobile app. Here’s every item in t...

item.title: Tesla reveals 2026 Summer Update with crazy fixes to Nav and more
item.description: Tesla has officially revealed its 2026 Summer Update, which comes with a variety of crazy new features, including Navigation fixes that owners have been wanting for months. Tesla routinely releases a larger update with the Spring, Summer, Fall, and Winter updates, where it ships a variety of new ...

item.title: Tesla’s reason for Starlink integration on Cybercab might surprise you
item.description: Tesla’s reason for Starlink integration on Cybercab might surprise you, as the company’s Head of AI, Ashok Elluswamy, finally shed some light on the reason they are putting a satellite internet terminal on its ride-hailing-geared vehicle. On Monday, Tesla officially confirmed that it would integr...

item.title: A Tesla-SpaceX Merger Brewing? Here's What Investors Need to Know
item.description: TSLA-SPCX merger rumors highlight major AI, manufacturing and connectivity synergies, but governance, regulatory and capital risks remain.

item.title: Tesla adds Robotaxi in Tampa and Orlando as Austin stalls at 17 cars
item.description: Tesla switched on its “Robotaxi” service in Tampa and Orlando on Monday, adding two Florida cities to a driverless network that still runs on a couple dozen cars. The company’s @robotaxi account announced it in a four-word post: “Robotaxi now in Tampa & Orlando!” The timing isn’t subtle. Tesla re...

item.title: Tesla Expands Robotaxi Service To Orlando, Tampa A Day Before Earnings Report
item.description: The state of Tesla's robotaxi service will be a key topic of discussion during its earnings call on Wednesday. The stock rose more than 2.5%.

item.title: This Is the Mag 7’s Worst Performer Right Now. Can Q2 Change the Story?
item.description: Tesla sits dead last among the Magnificent 7 in 2026, weighed down by inventory creep, collapsing energy revenue, and a valuation that makes even bulls sweat. But Q2 earnings could rewrite the narrative entirely, and prediction markets are already placing their bets.

item.title: SpaceX to report first earnings on Aug. 4: What to expect
item.description: Since going public on June 12, SpaceX (SPCX) confirmed that it will report its first quarterly earnings results on Tuesday, August 4. Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferre and Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma join the Opening Bid panel to talk more about what investors could be expectin...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi program expands in Florida to two new cities
item.description: Tesla has expanded its Robotaxi program in Florida to include two new cities: Tampa and Orlando. This marks the second and third cities to be added to the company’s available locations for autonomous ride-hailing in the Sunshine State, joining Miami, which was the first Florida city to offer Robo...

item.title: What Construction Of Elon Musk's Terafab Would Mean For Tesla, SpaceX
item.description: Elon Musk wants to build the largest semiconductor factory in the world to supply Tesla and SpaceX with AI chips.

item.title: Tesla expands robotaxi service to Orlando, Tampa ahead of earnings
item.description: Tesla on Tuesday expanded its robotaxi service to Orlando and Tampa, as ‌the electric-vehicle maker races to prove that ‌it can scale its autonomous ride-hailing business beyond its initial ​launch markets. The move comes a day before Tesla reports second-quarter earnings, with Wall Street closel...

item.title: Tesla FSD V14 Lite for HW3 Vehicles Begins Public Rollout
item.description: Tesla FSD V14 Lite for HW3 Vehicles Begins Public Rollout

item.title: Tesla Cash Burn Puts AI Spending in Focus
item.description: Heavy investment in robotaxis and robotics is raising pressure on near-term cash flow.

item.title: Tesla Needs More Than an Earnings Beat on Wednesday
item.description: As strange as it sounds. Tesla’s earnings aren’t that important on its second-quarter earnings report. Come to think of it, that isn’t that strange for Elon Musk’s EV maker.

item.title: Wall Street Veteran Says Tesla Stock is About to Fall, and $550 Million Agrees
item.description: A 35-year Wall Street veteran says Tesla stock is set to fall, and options traders backed him with a $550 million bet into Q2 earnings.

item.title: Tesla cash burn to test investor faith in AI bets
item.description: Tesla is expected to report its first quarterly cash burn in over two years on Wednesday, as its spending on AI and robotics soars, intensifying investor scrutiny over when those bets ‌will pay off. CEO Elon Musk has pivoted the electric-vehicle maker's focus from manufacturing cars to building s...

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Rebound As Chip Rally Counters Iran Jitters: Why NBIS, NVDA, INTC, TSLA, IREN, MU Are In Focus
item.description: Stocktwits data showed retail sentiment was split: ‘bearish’ on SPY but ‘bullish’ on QQQ.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Tests Semi On Chicago Routes As Fair Value Debate Heats Up
item.description: Paper Transport LLC’s new partnership with Tesla (TSLA) to test the Tesla Semi Long Range on fixed Chicago routes gives investors a fresh, real world data point on the company’s battery electric freight ambitions. See our latest analysis for Tesla. Tesla’s share price has recently been under pres...

item.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Alphabet, Tesla, Intel, American Express, Adida, Nike and Carlsberg
item.description: Alphabet headlines a pivotal earnings week as investors watch AI spending plans, while central bank decisions and global events shape market sentiment.

item.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Tesla
item.description: Tesla heads into earnings after a strong delivery quarter, but investors now await answers on margins, AI spending and whether sales momentum can last.

item.title: Tesla’s AI Chief just hinted at something big for FSD v14 lite owners
item.description: Tesla’s head of AI, Ashok Elluswamy, noted on Sunday that the newest FSD v14 Lite build rolling out to Hardware 3 cars is likely the version that goes to wide release, the strongest signal yet that Tesla is near to closing out an early access phase that Hardware 3 owners have waited more than a y...

item.title: Ahead of Tesla Earnings, Gary Black Says Cybercab Fleet Milestone Is 'Irrelevant' Until This Critical FSD Goal Is Achieved: 'Just for Show'
item.description: Tesla Inc.‘s (NASDAQ:TSLA) Cybercab fleet expansion does not impress investor Gary Black of The Future Fund LLC, who says that any expansion would not amount to much unless true autonomy is achieved. Cybercab Irrelevant to Investors In a response to user @CuriousPejjy, who talked about the recent...

item.title: TSLA Stock Falls Behind MSFT To Become Mag 7’s Worst Performer Ahead Of Q2 Earnings — But Retail Is Betting On A Musk Surprise
item.description: TSLA has also dropped 8% over the past month and 6% over three months, while Apple, Alphabet, Nvidia and Amazon remain positive for the year.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Reports Q2: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
item.description: Electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) will be reporting earnings this Wednesday after market close. Here’s what to expect.

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Delivered 480,126 Vehicles in Its Best Quarter in 2 Years
item.description: Can the company ride this momentum?

item.title: Cramer Says Dump Tech Before Intel, Tesla, Alphabet Earnings: Will Inverse-Cramer Strike?
item.description: Jim Cramer dumped tech stocks ahead of Intel, Tesla, and Alphabet earnings, reviving bets on the Inverse-Cramer Effect.

item.title: Elon Musk just got a new rival on three fronts
item.description: Every dominant company eventually meets the competitor it decided not to take seriously. The pattern is boring by now. The incumbent has the brand, the cash and the head start, so the upstart gets filed under interesting rather than dangerous, right up until the quarter it stops being either.

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Rise As Chip Rally Counters Iran Jitters Ahead Of Big Tech Earnings: Why IREN, ACHR, TSLA, BA Stocks Are Drawing Focus
item.description: Chip stocks staged a comeback on Monday, gaining at the close after a sharp selloff last week.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Comments Spark Stock Market Losses; Elon Musk-Led SpaceX, Tesla Tumble
item.description: Dow Jones Futures: Trump sparked losses Monday after he said Iran "will pay" for killing American soldiers. SpaceX and Tesla sold off.

item.title: Elon Musk sends first warning to SpaceX short sellers
item.description: In a pointed message on X, Elon Musk warned that firms maintaining significant short positions in SpaceX over time face “very low” survival probability. The statement comes amid post-IPO volatility for the rocket company, now trading under the ticker $SPCX . The survival probability of firms who ...

item.title: Tesla puts Starlink antenna in Cybercab
item.description: Tesla and Starlink say SpaceX’s satellite internet is now “directly integrated” into the Cybercab, Tesla’s dedicated robotaxi. The reveal came through a pair of posts on X on Monday, with a cutaway diagram showing a Starlink antenna sitting in the vehicle’s roof. Neither company explained why a c...

item.title: Elon Musk Says AI and Robots Will Do ‘So Much Stuff’ We Run Out of Things for Humans to Do — But ‘We’ll Basically Just Issue Money to People’
item.description: The biggest workplace debate of the next decade might not be about asking for a raise. It could be figuring out what to do when the robots have already finished the job. That’s the future Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon...

item.title: Buy Tesla Stock Before Q2 Earnings, or Wait for the Results?
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is set to report Q2 results after the closing bell on Wednesday, July 22, with investors hoping the EV leader can build on a surprisingly strong delivery report.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Faces A New Fremont Neighbor As Agility Opens Robot Training Center
item.description: Agility Robotics has opened a humanoid robot training center near Tesla's upcoming Optimus factory in Fremont. The facility sits next to the planned Tesla Optimus site, highlighting growing activity in humanoid robotics for industrial use. The development spotlights potential competition and coll...

item.title: The Number Tesla Stock Bulls Are Really Waiting for This Earnings Season Has Nothing to Do With Cars
item.description: Elon Musk promised Optimus production will begin in July. He will deliver the Q2 earnings on July 22, and analysts will be looking for answers.

item.title: Strong earnings growth needed to justify tech valuations, says expert
item.description: STORY: Citing Alphabet's Google and Elon Musk's Tesla as examples, Brown said that "to justify the high valuations that we see in a lot of those names, we would need to see good earnings growth, not just kind of your run-of-the-mill 10%, but you'd want to see higher earnings growth on top of good...

item.title: Starlink Mini V2 Enters Production With Built-in Battery
item.description: Starlink Mini V2 Enters Production With Built-in Battery
